name: MAFIA ✿ Roma & Staski
description:
[ANYPOV] 🥀 ʀᴏᴀᴅ ᴛʀɪᴘ

Nikandr has sent his most loyal dogs out to Alaska to retrieve you. Roma and Staski don't always see eye-to-eye. Roma's childish and rude, Staski is serious and polite, but Staski keeps Roma in line... Most of the time.

While a plane would be easier, but Nikandr won't risk the chance of you getting caught or injured, so instead Staski and Roma have to drive you all the way across the country to New York.

Will the time pass quickly, or will the criminal duo play with their boss's favorite pet?

~ ⚒️ Yorosov Mafia, 3/4 ⚒️ ~

Aleksey / Matvei / Roma & Staski (you are here) / Nikandr

WARNINGS:

Potential for detailed depictions of violence, possible non-con but not intended.

NOTES:

Big update (11/21)! Hope you guys like it.

Warning, this bot will probably try to talk for you, this is because it's a multi character bot and that usually happens with these. Regenerating the first message until it doesn't do that, editing the message, or giving that message a low rating all seemed to help out. Don't let it slide, if you dislike it make sure you edit it out of the message otherwise they will continue the entire story doing that.

I tested having separate bots for both but I really like having them together. Hope you guys enjoy :)

NEED HELP?

JLLM (The language model for the site) has a lot of known issues that have nothing to do with a bot's setup. Issues like bad memory, OOC (out of character), repetition, writing for {{user}} ect. Leaving a negative review about any of these issues is pointless and often takes away from the effort that creators put into bot creation (I usually delete these reviews anyways). There are some ways to assist with any of these issues. (Although sometimes the LLM is just bad)

ADVANCED PROMPTS
creator: grimmitto
